# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build artifacts
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: ./dist

  deploy_staging:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build-artifacts

      - name: Deploy to Staging
        env:
          STAGING_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.STAGING_API_KEY }}
        run: |
          ./deploy_staging.sh

  deploy_production:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy_staging
    steps:
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build-artifacts

      - name: Deploy to Production
        env:
          PRODUCTION_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_API_KEY }}
        run: |
          ./deploy_production.sh
